title: Metal-antibody MIBItag conjugation kit
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"o375","text":"This is a \"protocol IO\" extended version of MIBItag conjugation kit protocol from Ionpath.  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"odsgx","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"1f7jY","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":415648,"guid":"42563F26341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Centrifugal Filter Unit: 50 kDa Amicon Ultra 500 μL V bottom","mol_weight":0,"sku":"UFC505096","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":8,"name":"Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore)","link":"http://www.emdmillipore.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Add 300 µL of Buffer 2 ( 100 mM phosphate buffer, 2.5 mM EDTA, pH 7.2) to a 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device Centrifugal Filter Unit: 50 kDa Amicon Ultra 500 μL V bottom Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #UFC505096
If step 2 not performed and antibody solution volume is less than 200 µL Add the 100 µg antibody solution volume
12000 rcf, Room temperature, 00:10:00 or 21000 rcf, Room temperature, 5 minutes

Critical: the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device is designed to hold up to 500 µL If 100 µg of antibody requires addition of more than 200 µL in volume Add up to 500 µL of antibody solution in the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device Centrifuge 12000 rcf, Room temperature, 00:10:00 or 21000 rcf, Room temperature, 5 minutes Centrifugal Filter Unit: 50 kDa Amicon Ultra 500 μL V bottom Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #UFC505096
Add 400 µL of buffer 2 IonPath

A B C D E F G H I J 1 Antibody (clone) Isotope/Element Pre-label Nanodrop (µg/mL) Volume to label 200 µg Post-label Nanodrop (µg/mL) Labelled volume Dilution for 200 µg/mL Total volume Volume of stabilizer Conjug ID 2 3 4 5 6 7 MIBItag conjugation kit IonPath Catalog #600XXX

12000 x g, Room temperature, 00:10:00 or 21000 rcf, Room temperature, 5 minutes Make sure that the residual dead volume is below the bottom end of the filter (~20 µL) Do not measure with a pipette, just inspect visually if the level of the fluid is as shown in the pictures (blue dye was used for demonstration only to help visualizing the fluid)

Dilute 8 µL of TCEP (0.5M) in 992 µL of buffer 2 ( 4 millimolar (mM) final) Tris(2-carboxyethyl)phosphine hydrochloride solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #646547-10X1ML Note: 10 µL TCEP is aliquots are stored at -20 °C
Add 100 µL of diluted TCEP to the concentrated antibody in the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device
Mix antibody and TCEP solution by flicking the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device gently
Incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00 ONLY Do not incubate longer than 30 min , this will result in full reduction of disulfide bonds necessary for the structural integrity of the antibody
After incubation, add immediately 300 µL of buffer 3 to the partially reduced antibody in the50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device
Mix reduced antibody and wash buffer 3 (Tris buffed salt, 1 mM EDTA, pH 7.5) by flicking the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device gently
12000 rcf, Room temperature, 10 minutes or 21000 rcf, Room temperature, 5 minutes
Discard the flow through
Add additional 400 µL of buffer 3 go to step #14
Reconstitute preloaded polymer in 100 µL of buffer 3
Transfer the preloaded polymer solution in the reduced antibody/ 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device
Mix reduced antibody and preloaded polymer by flicking the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device gently
Inccubate 37 °C for 01:30:00 to 02:00:00
Add 250 µL of buffer 4 to the antibody conjugation mixture in the the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device

Make sure to align the filters parallel to centrifuge force to ensure optimal tengential flow filtration of both filters This can be done by centering the hinge of the collecting tube between the two filters The 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device is then placed in the centrifuge with the hinge outward
Mix antibody conjugation mixture and buffer 4 (Tris buffed salt, pH 7.5) by flicking the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device gently
12000 rcf, Room temperature, 10 minutes or 21000 rcf, Room temperature, 5 minutes
Discard the flow through
Add 400 µL of buffer 4 in the the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device go to step #22 to 24
Add 400 µL of buffer 4 in the the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device go to step #22 to 24
Add 400 µL of buffer 4 in the the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device go to step #22 to 24
Add 400 µL of buffer 4 in the the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device go to step #22 to 24
Add 50 µL of buffer 4 to the washed labelled antibody in the the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device
Mix washed labelled antibody and buffer 4 by flicking the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device gently
Invert the micro-filter into a new collection tube
10000 rcf, Room temperature, 1 minute
Add 80 µL of buffer 4 to the washed labelled antibody in the the 50-kDa MWCO micro-filter device go to step #30 to 33
Measure the volume retrieved with a pipette (200 µL) and register data in labelled volume on the worksheet go to step #1
Open Nanodrop using Protein 280 and chose type = IgG
Blank with buffer 4
Take 1.5 µL of labelled antibody and measure concentration
Clean the cell with ultrapure (type 1) water
Register data in labelled volume on the worksheet go to step #1
Open MIBItracker and click on CONJUGATES tab
Click on Add Conjugate tab
Select the antibody reference used for the conjugation Fill the following fields: Isotope / Channel ; Element ; µg for labelling ; Responsible
Click on SUBMIT , this will generate a conjugation ID number Click on back to Conjugate and filter by conjugation date
Record the ID number on your experiment worksheet go to step #1
Click on Edit Conjugate
Enter Nanodrop reading post-labelling and Volume of labeled antibody in the respective fields

For a standard labeled stock concentration (200 µg/mL), the Dilution factor and the volume of Antibody Stabilizer is calculated automatically If the Dilution factor is less than <1, change labeled stock concentration to 100 µg/mL
Add the volume of Antibody Stabilizer to the antibody labeled collection tube. Use Tris-based antibody stabilizer (Boca Scientific).
Transfer the diluted labeled antibody into a new screw cap microcentrifuge tube
Label the tube with printer Brady 21-Lab, (Label for 1.5 mL vial, Auto bold) Line1: Target name, Channel Line2: ID: number Line3: date (mm/dd/yy)
Hand write the target name and the channel on a dot label and place on the screw cap

Labeled can be stored short term for <3 months at 4˚C in solution Preferably, the newly labeled labeled antibody is immediately placed in the lyophilization box at 4˚C in queue to be lyophilized and then placed at 4˚C in designated box for longterm storage management
creator: Marc Bosse
